---
title: Short Articles
author: Walter Dal'Maz Silva
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: default
---

## By topic

### General

- []

### Transport Phenomena

- [Steady-state heat transfer](julia-steady-conduction.html)

### Model Predictive Control

- [A Chemical Plant MPC](chemical-plant-mpc.html)

### Data Science and Machine Learning

- [How Many More Points?](recursive-mean.html)
- [How will I finish?](how-will-i-finish.html)

<!--
## General index
-->
